# 524 Tracker

> Free credit card application rules tracker for points and miles enthusiasts. Track Chase 5/24 status, Amex lifetime bonus eligibility, Citi 8/65 rules, Bank of America 2/3/4 restrictions, and more — all stored locally in your browser, never sent to any server.

## Main Tools
- [Chase 5/24 Tracker](https://524tracker.com/): Track your Chase 5/24 card count and next eligibility date
- [Card Tracker](https://524tracker.com/card-tracker): Log your full card application history and calculate status across Chase 5/24, Amex lifetime, Citi 8/65, BofA 2/3/4, and Capital One 2-card rules simultaneously
- [Spend Tracker](https://524tracker.com/spend-tracker): Track welcome bonus minimum spend progress across all your cards — see days remaining, dollars left, and daily spend needed to hit each deadline
- [Application Flowchart](https://524tracker.com/application-flowchart): Interactive decision tool that recommends what credit card to apply for next based on your 5/24 status, rewards preference, and existing cards
- [Card Value Calculator](https://524tracker.com/card-value-calculator): Calculate the net value of a card after annual fee vs. benefits
- [Best Cards by Category](https://524tracker.com/best-cards-by-category): Find the highest-earning card for dining, travel, groceries, gas, and more
- [Top Cards](https://524tracker.com/top-cards): Best credit cards to apply for, optimized for points maximizers
- [Rules Guide](https://524tracker.com/rules-guide): Complete explanation of all major bank credit card application rules
- [Velocity Rule Checker](https://524tracker.com/velocity-checker): Check your eligibility across all bank velocity rules — Chase 5/24, Amex 2/90, Citi 8/65, BofA 2/3/4, and more
- [Annual Fee Calculator](https://524tracker.com/annual-fee-calculator): Calculate whether a credit card annual fee is worth it based on your spending and credit usage
- [Application Timing Calculator](https://524tracker.com/application-timing): Get optimal application dates and sequencing for your credit card wishlist
- [Amex Popup Jail Estimator](https://524tracker.com/amex-popup-estimator): Estimate your risk of getting the Amex popup that blocks welcome bonuses
- [Downgrade Guide](https://524tracker.com/downgrade-guide): Find product change and downgrade paths for premium credit cards by issuer
- [Credit Pull Database](https://524tracker.com/credit-pull-database): Look up which credit bureau each bank pulls for every major credit card
- [Hard Inquiry Tracker](https://524tracker.com/inquiry-tracker): Track hard inquiries per credit bureau and see where you stand vs inquiry-sensitive banks

## Blog
- [Blog](https://524tracker.com/blog): Expert guides on credit card application rules, churning strategies, and bank-specific restrictions
- [Chase 5/24 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/chase-5-24-rule-explained): Everything you need to know about Chase's 5/24 rule — what counts, what doesn't, and how to check your status
- [Amex Lifetime Bonus Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/amex-lifetime-bonus-rule-explained): The Amex lifetime rule means you can only earn a welcome bonus on each card once per lifetime
- [Citi 8/65 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/citi-8-65-rule-explained): The Citi 8/65 rule limits you to 1 Citi card every 8 days and 2 every 65 days
- [Bank of America 2/3/4 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/bank-of-america-2-3-4-rule-explained): BoA limits approvals to 2 in 30 days, 3 in 12 months, and 4 in 24 months
- [Credit Card Velocity Rules: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/credit-card-velocity-rules-explained): Every issuer's application limits — Chase 5/24, Amex 2/90, Citi 8/65, BofA 2/3/4, and 5 more banks
- [Amex Popup Jail Explained](https://524tracker.com/blog/amex-popup-jail-explained): What triggers the Amex popup, how to escape, and how to estimate your risk
- [Is the Chase Sapphire Reserve Worth It?](https://524tracker.com/blog/is-chase-sapphire-reserve-worth-it-2026): Honest math on the $550 annual fee — when it pays for itself and when it doesn't
- [Is the Amex Platinum Worth It?](https://524tracker.com/blog/is-amex-platinum-worth-it-2026): Breaking down $695 annual fee vs $1,400+ in credits — the real value calculation
- [Amex Application Rules: 1/5 and 2/90](https://524tracker.com/blog/amex-1-5-rule-2-90-rule-explained): Every Amex velocity rule including credit card limits and charge card exceptions
- [Citi Advanced Rules: 48-Month Trap](https://524tracker.com/blog/citi-application-rules-advanced): The 48-month bonus clock reset trap, family card rules, and timing strategies
- [Capital One Application Rules](https://524tracker.com/blog/capital-one-application-rules): 3-bureau pulls, 2 consumer card limit, and why CapOne business cards count toward 5/24
- [Best Cards Under 5/24 in 2026](https://524tracker.com/blog/best-credit-cards-under-5-24-2026): Priority-ranked list of the best cards to get before crossing the 5/24 threshold
- [Credit Card Downgrade Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/credit-card-downgrade-guide-2026): When to downgrade vs cancel, how points transfer, and every major downgrade path
- [Which Bureau Does Chase Pull?](https://524tracker.com/blog/which-credit-bureau-does-chase-pull): Chase's primary bureau by state and how to use strategic bureau freezes
- [Barclays, US Bank, Wells Fargo Rules](https://524tracker.com/blog/barclays-us-bank-wells-fargo-application-rules): The underrated velocity limits — Barclays 6/24, US Bank 5/12, Wells Fargo 48-month rule
- [Is the Amex Gold Worth It?](https://524tracker.com/blog/amex-gold-worth-it-2026): $120 dining + $120 Uber + 4x groceries — the math on the $250 annual fee
- [Hard Inquiry Impact on Applications](https://524tracker.com/blog/credit-card-hard-inquiry-impact): How each issuer views inquiries differently and how to manage inquiry distribution
- [Optimal Application Timing 2026](https://524tracker.com/blog/optimal-credit-card-application-timing-2026): Exact spacing rules and a 12-month application calendar strategy
- [BofA 7/12 Rule and Preferred Rewards](https://524tracker.com/blog/bank-of-america-7-12-rule-preferred-rewards): Advanced BofA strategies — the 7/12 cross-issuer rule and Alaska companion fare

## About
- [About](https://524tracker.com/about): About this tool and how it works
- [Privacy Policy](https://524tracker.com/privacy): All data stored locally in your browser — nothing sent to servers
- [Terms of Service](https://524tracker.com/terms): Terms of use

## Key Facts
- All tracking data stored in browser localStorage only — never transmitted to any server
- No account or login required
- Free to use, supported by advertising and card affiliate links
- Rules based on community knowledge from r/churning — always verify with card issuer before applying
